_comment: Language perturbation instruction bank. Each task maps to a list of alternative instruction phrasings combining R1 (distraction), R2 (synonym rewording), and R3 (goal-state) styles. Extend this file with additional tasks as needed.
put_cup_on_coaster: Place the cup onto the coaster on the table.
Hey, quick favor -- could you put the cup on that coaster?
The lights are flickering again, but anyway, move the cup onto the coaster.
Position the drinking vessel onto the circular mat on the surface.
Use one arm to set the cylindrical container onto the protective disc.
Ensure the cup ends up resting on the coaster.
The desired outcome is that the cup has been placed on the coaster.
By the end, the cup should be sitting on top of the coaster.
I forgot my keys in the car, but first, put the cup on the coaster please.
Transfer the mug to the coaster on the table.
move_cup_onto_table: Move the cup onto the table.
Could you grab the cup and place it on the table surface?
Before we head out, move that cup onto the table.
Relocate the drinking vessel to the tabletop.
The end state should be the cup resting on the table.
Ensure the cup has been moved from its current position onto the table.
Someone left the door open, anyway, put the cup on the table.
Transport the cylindrical drinking container to the flat work surface.
Make sure the cup ends up on the table.
Place the cup down on the table surface.
put_pen_in_pencup: Put the pen in the pencil cup.
Hey, could you drop that pen into the pencil holder?
The printer is jammed again, but can you put the pen in the pencup?
Insert the writing instrument into the cylindrical holder.
Place the elongated marking tool into the upright container.
Ensure the pen ends up inside the pencil cup.
The goal is for the pen to be standing in the pencup.
By the end, the pen should be inserted into the pencil holder.
Transfer the pen into the pencup on the table.
Deposit the writing utensil into the pen container.
move_seal_onto_book: Move the seal onto the book.
Quick thing -- place the seal on top of the book please.
I think we're out of coffee, but anyway, move the seal onto the book.
Position the stamp on the surface of the book.
Relocate the seal object so it rests on the book.
The desired outcome is the seal sitting on the book.
Ensure the seal has been placed on top of the book.
Transfer the seal from its current spot onto the book.
Put the stamp-like object onto the flat reading material.
By the end, the seal should be on the book.
put_cup_in_box: Put the cup in the box.
Hey, can you place that cup inside the box?
Someone parked in my spot again, but could you put the cup in the box?
Insert the drinking vessel into the open container.
Place the cylindrical cup into the rectangular receptacle.
Ensure the cup ends up inside the box.
The goal is for the cup to be contained within the box.
By the end, the cup should be sitting inside the box.
Transfer the cup into the box on the table.
Deposit the cup into the open-top container.
